title: Indian-Style Chicken Vindaloo
description: A spicy Indian-inspired chicken dish made with marinated chicken cooked in a rich tomato-based sauce. Serve with rice or naan bread for a flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Vindaloo Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available in most Indian grocery stores or online

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the vindaloo spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
